families.label: Contract gap repair
families.expectedFailure: stale or incomplete source contract blocks connected/trusted maturity
families.operatorValue: repairs contract identity without faking extraction or broad source completion

families.label: Trust gap repair
families.operatorValue: keeps public/proposal sources honest before monitoring or extraction

families.label: Monitoring gap repair
families.expectedFailure: signed-off source has facts but no explicit refresh/monitoring boundary
families.operatorValue: clears false monitored blockers while exposing the next real gap

families.label: Evidence gap repair
families.expectedFailure: source contract exists but no source-backed fact/evidence signal is attached
families.operatorValue: attaches existing evidence without starting live extraction

families.label: Atom-flow repair
families.expectedFailure: source fact exists but no governed atom-flow signal exists
families.operatorValue: promotes source-backed atom evidence without fabricating atoms

families.label: Routing gap repair
families.expectedFailure: source-backed atom/chunk exists but no approval-required internal route exists
families.operatorValue: routes intelligence to review without external write or route apply

families.label: Gap follow-up triage
families.expectedFailure: source maturity closeout rows need ranked follow-up cards
families.operatorValue: turns maturity gaps into scoped internal repair cards without extraction
